nodes.label: AI as efficient filter for database sifting
nodes.grounding_span: helps me narrow down the pool a lot faster

nodes.label: AI as independent scheduler for repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI requiring step-by-step collaboration for scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely let it handle schedules alone

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for creative filtering
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous decision-maker in casting
nodes.grounding_span: with stuff related to filtering the database, we do feel like more of a team

nodes.label: Human irreplaceability in assessing chemistry and fit
nodes.label_negative: AI capability to fully replace human judgment in casting
nodes.grounding_span: AI will ever be able to fully understand and feel chemistry between two actors like a person can

nodes.label: AI use in entertainment industry as controversial
nodes.label_negative: AI use in entertainment as universally accepted
nodes.grounding_span: there are a lot of strong opinions on whether we should use AI in any capacity

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and final say
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely get the final say in who gets picked

nodes.label: Meaningful human connection with actors
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I can really get to know the actors and not rush them out the door

nodes.label: Job security and professional identity
nodes.grounding_span: it's scary to think that my job could be fully automated one day

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving in casting
nodes.grounding_span: A lot of AI-related satisfaction comes from that fast turnaround with casting

nodes.label: Contentment with current AI balance
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like we're at a good balance as-is

nodes.label: Concern about job automation
nodes.grounding_span: it's scary to think that my job could be fully automated one day

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing human intuition
nodes.grounding_span: I really don't think AI will ever be able to fully understand and feel chemistry

nodes.label: Task-based delegation — assigns different levels of autonomy based on task type
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely let it handle schedules alone... but with stuff related to filtering the database, we do feel like more of a team

nodes.label: Intuition-driven final judgment — relies on personal feel despite data
nodes.grounding_span: you really have to meet a lot of these people in person to know whether they're a great fit or not
